title: Refresh stale Robynn JWTs in hosted MCP tools
description: Claude Desktop can keep using a hosted Robynn MCP session after the upstream robynn.ai access JWT in Durable Object props expires, causing tool calls such as robynn_capabilities to return 401. Refresh the upstream token on 401 and retry once.

title: Return full capability manifest in MCP text fallback
description: Claude Desktop can load robynn_capabilities but appears to answer from content[0].text, which currently only says Loaded 6 Robynn bridge capabilities. Return the full manifest in text fallback while keeping structuredContent.

title: Register Hermes bridge capability and brand operation tools
description: Expose new robynnv3 bridge APIs through hosted MCP and local robynn mcp with parity tests.

title: Make MCP context checks use readonly Beads readiness
description: Fresh workspace initialization should not mutate tracked Beads exports when checking ready MCP work.
acceptance_criteria: scripts/context-check.sh uses bd ready --readonly --json while preserving bootstrap recovery from tracked Beads data.
close_reason: Implemented readonly bd ready probes in scripts/context-check.sh.
